summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shopply v6 features: Geolocation fix with manual location picker and improved product list. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - LocationPicker modal works correctly with GPS button, search input, 10 preset locations, and Nominatim geocoding. Autocomplete returns multiple results with 'contains' matching.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/prodotti/autocomplete?q=la: Returns 9 results (multiple, not just 1)
✅ GET /api/prodotti/autocomplete?q=pa: Returns diverse results with 'contains' matching
✅ GET /api/prodotti/autocomplete?q=latte: Returns 5 diverse results
✅ GET /api/prodotti/autocomplete: Max 20 results enforced
✅ GET /api/prodotti?limit=500: Returns 500 products (pagination working)
✅ GET /api/prodotti?categoria=Latticini: Returns 240 filtered products
✅ GET /api/prodotti with skip: Pagination returns different products
✅ GET /api/catalogo: Returns 210 unique products
✅ GET /api/catalogo product structure: Has prezzo_min, prezzo_max, num_supermercati
✅ GET /api/catalogo?categoria=Bevande: Returns 23 beverage products
✅ GET /api/catalogo?categoria=Latticini: Returns filtered dairy products
✅ GET /api/categorie: Returns all 12 categories
✅ GET /api/supermercati: Returns all 12 supermarkets
✅ Frontend: Home page shows location bar with 'Pioltello Centro' and coordinates (45.4945, 9.3256)
✅ Frontend: Clicking location bar opens modal with 'Imposta Posizione' title
✅ Frontend: Location picker shows 'Usa GPS' button
✅ Frontend: Location picker shows search input for address search
✅ Frontend: Location picker shows 10 preset locations (Pioltello Centro, Segrate, Cernusco sul Naviglio, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Selecting preset location (Segrate) closes modal and updates location bar
✅ Frontend: Location bar updates to show new location name and coordinates
✅ Frontend: Location search with Nominatim geocoding returns results for 'Milano'
✅ Frontend: Product autocomplete shows 9 suggestions for 'la'
✅ Frontend: Product autocomplete shows 6 suggestions for 'latte'
✅ Frontend: Selecting autocomplete suggestion adds product to shopping list
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: 12 supermarkets, 2532 products, 12 categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopply v6 fully tested. Geolocation fix implemented with manual LocationPicker component. Browser geolocation returns server IP location in preview environment (expected behavior), so manual location selection is the primary method. LocationPicker uses Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) for geocoding - NOT MOCKED, real API calls. Autocomplete uses regex 'contains' matching and returns up to 20 unique product names. /api/catalogo uses MongoDB aggregation to deduplicate products across stores.

mocked_apis.Nominatim geocoding: NOT MOCKED - Real API calls to nominatim.openstreetmap.org
mocked_apis.Browser geolocation: Returns server IP location in preview environment (expected)

location_picker.gps_button: Present and functional (shows alert if denied)
location_picker.modal_behavior: Opens on click, closes on selection

autocomplete.multiple_results: Returns up to 20 unique product names
